close_reason: Implemented alongside 9.1 [T] — SecretStore with add/get/serialize/deserialize, age encryption
description: Implement SecretStore using age crate for encryption. Holds age identity (private key), encrypts each value. mxdx-tky: new_with_test_key() must be #[cfg(test)] gated with fixed key for deterministic tests.
title: Task 9.1 [C]: Secret Store Implementation

close_reason: SecretCoordinator double-encryption with age ephemeral keys (9+2 tests)
description: Implement double encryption (mxdx-adr2): worker sends SecretRequestEvent with one-time age public key, coordinator encrypts with worker's public key using age, response contains age-encrypted ciphertext not plaintext. Even if Megolm keys compromised, secret requires ephemeral private key. E2E test: worker_requests_secret_with_double_encryption, unauthorized_worker_cannot_get_secret.
title: Task 9.2 [T]+[C]: Double-Encrypted Secret Delivery

close_reason: Security review complete, HIGH finding: sender verification needed
description: Security review Phase 9. Checklist: secret never plaintext in Matrix event (mxdx-adr2), ephemeral key one-time use not reused, new_with_test_key is cfg(test) gated (mxdx-tky), unauthorized requests denied, audit trail logged. Adversarial variant: replay SecretRequestEvent with same ephemeral key.
title: Task 9.3 [S]: Phase 9 Security Review

description: Comprehensive CLI non-interactive E2E against local Tuwunel: echo, date, multi-line output, stderr separation, exit codes (0 and non-zero), timeout handling. Measure latency: command send to first output event. Assert < 5s local.
